name: mixed
description: Realistic blend with declared mix proportions: 60% chat-like, 25% RAG-like, 15% generation-heavy, expressed as mixture length distributions (same weights on the input and output side). Note: the schema samples input and output lengths independently, so the proportions hold per dimension but individual requests do not carry correlated (input, output) archetype pairs - recorded limitation, see workloads/README.md. All output components capped (max 2048). v1 keeps prefix-sharing, cancellation, and slow-client at 0 so the blend isolates length/arrival realism; a later version bump may add low-rate cancellation once IB-T004 lands. Canonical suite v1 (IB-T003).
